About the Artist

I take your digital identity and make it breathe.

I'm Onab — a digital artist specializing in character design, illustration, and NFT/Web3 art. My work lives at the intersection of internet culture and hand-crafted artistry. Every PFP tells a story. My job is to draw it out.

From expressive characters to full scene illustrations, I bring a bold, graphic style rooted in cartoon energy and contemporary web3 aesthetics. I work with collectors, brands, and communities who want their digital identity to feel real.

Digital Illustration Character Design NFT / Web3 Art Concept Art PFP Commissions Brand Characters
Based in Lagos, Nigeria
Available for Commissions & Collabs
Response time Within 24 hours
